memory-flow.title: Conversation memory — one follow-up turn
memory-flow.subtitle: Prior (question, IR) pairs are fed to the planner; the LLM still only emits IR, never SQL
memory-flow.graph:
flowchart TB U["User asks a follow-up
('only for 2026')"]:::person SS[("st.session_state.history
render log")]:::store RT["recent_turns(history, limit=4)
answered turns only · IR not rows"]:::app ASK["Engine.ask(question, history)
forwards history on every retry"]:::app PLAN["AnthropicPlanner.plan(…, history)"]:::app HB["_history_block()
prepended to the user message"]:::app LLM["Anthropic client (wrapped)
tool call → emit_query | emit_comparison"]:::ext CMP["validate_ir + compile + execute
deterministic"]:::app DB[("SQLite")]:::store RES["Result(ir, sql, params, rows)"]:::focal U --> RT SS -- "answered turns" --> RT RT -- "[{question, ir}]" --> ASK ASK --> PLAN PLAN --> HB HB -- "CONVERSATION SO FAR + question" --> LLM LLM -- "IR — never SQL" --> CMP CMP --> DB DB -- "columns, rows" --> CMP CMP --> RES RES -- "append; becomes next turn's memory" --> SS

memory-callpath.title: Conversation memory — call path
memory-callpath.subtitle: Who owns what across chat/app.py and engine/
memory-callpath.graph:
flowchart LR subgraph UI["chat/app.py — per session"] H[("session_state.history")]:::store RT["recent_turns()
pure · cap 4 · skip errors"]:::app H --> RT end subgraph ENG["engine/"] ASK["Engine.ask(question, history)"]:::app PLAN["AnthropicPlanner.plan(…, history)"]:::app HB["_history_block()"]:::app ASK --> PLAN PLAN --> HB end RT -- "[{question, ir}]" --> ASK HB -- "prepended to user msg" --> LLM["Anthropic → IR"]:::ext LLM --> CMP["validate + compile + execute"]:::app CMP -- "Result" --> H
